PR Title: Use imperative mood with a conventional commit prefix.
  Examples: "feat: add character idle animation", "fix: resolve black window on NVIDIA GPUs"
  Prefixes: feat, fix, docs, refactor, chore, test, ci, build
  The title appears in release notes — write it as a user-facing changelog entry.

Labels (maintainers will add):
  bug | enhancement | improvement | documentation | breaking-change
-->
